sections.heading: Overview
sections.body:
You can interact with Atlas through the following infrastructure as
code products:

| Product                                    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Atlas Kubernetes Operator                  | Manage Atlas resources without leaving Kubernetes.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| HashiCorp Terraform MongoDB Atlas Provider | Integrate Atlas into your continuous delivery workflows with the official plugin that is verified and tested by HashiCorp. To learn how to get started, see Get Started with Terraform and the MongoDB Atlas Provider. |
| Atlas CloudFormation Resources             | Use AWS CloudFormation to manage Atlas.                                                                                                                                                                                |
